sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 3.5. C 10.01 and C 10.02 – Equity exposures under the internal ratings based approach (CR EQU IRB 1 and CR EQU IRB 2)
sections.description: Details on equity exposures under the internal ratings based approach.

sections.description: Overview of the CR EQU IRB template and its components.

sections.description: Specific instructions for reporting positions in the CR EQU IRB templates.

C 10.01.name: CR EQU IRB 1 – Equity exposures under the internal ratings based approach
C 10.01.description: Reports a general overview of IRB exposures of the equity exposure class and methods to calculate total risk exposure amounts.

C 10.02.name: CR EQU IRB 2 – Equity exposures under the internal ratings based approach
C 10.02.description: Provides a breakdown of total exposures assigned to obligor grades in the context of the PD/LGD approach.
